intro_pages.scene_description: CHARACTER_A at her desk, surrounded by color-coded spreadsheets. She is labeling a label-maker with another label-maker. Her desk is a monument to organizational overreach.
intro_pages.narrator_caption: Emily has a system for everything. The system also has a system.

panels.action: Full page: CHARACTER_A immersed in her color-coded world, completely at peace in the chaos she's organized.

intro_pages.scene_description: CHARACTER_B bursts through the office door, phone pinched between ear and shoulder, coffee in one hand, a chaotic stack of papers in the other. Pure kinetic energy.
intro_pages.narrator_caption: Sophie has a system too. It's called chaos. It works somehow.
intro_pages.character_dialogue: Yes, yes — I'm on my way. I'm basically already there.

panels.action: Wide: The door swings open. A blur of motion enters.
Medium: CHARACTER_B in full stride, simultaneously on the phone and somehow also drinking coffee.
Close-up on her face: confident, chaotic, completely in control.
